description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora:latest Docker image and a before_script that installs dnf-command(copr), git, libtool, make, libasan, python3, python3-six, python3-pyparsing, glib-networking, enables the @spice/nightly COPR repository, and installs build dependencies for spice. Define a single job named makecheck (default stage) that runs the following commands: set CFLAGS='-O2 -pipe -g -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wframe-larger-than=40920' and LDFLAGS='-fsanitize=address -lasan' then execute ./autogen.sh --enable-extra-checks --enable-celt051, then run make, then run make check || (cat tests/test-suite.log && exit 1). The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, services, or special rules.
